description: Verify backend contracts are ready before the visual UI design phase begins.

command: import json, subprocess; data=json.loads(subprocess.check_output(['agent-system/bin/office-system','gui-state','--limit','1'], text=True)); ids=[item['id'] for item in data['capabilities']]; assert data['version']=='2.0.0'; assert data['digital_employees']['count'] >= 8; assert data['workflow_packs']['count'] >= 8; assert data['context_contract']['configured'] is True and data['context_contract']['schema_version']=='2.0.0'; assert set(data['context_contract']['acknowledgment_decisions'])=={'accept','request_context','reject'}; assert data['loop_runtime']['work_nodes']==['context','decide','act','evaluate']; assert {'loop_runtime','typed_agent_handoffs','digital_employee_registry'} <= set(ids); assert any(item['name']=='claude-for-legal-zh' and item['status']=='installed_local' for item in data['skill_installations']['items'])

test -f agent-system/docs/loop-engineering.zh-CN.md; test -f agent-system/docs/context-handoff.zh-CN.md; test -f agent-system/docs/pre-gui-production-audit.zh-CN.md; test -f agent-system/context-handoff.policy.json; test -f CHANGELOG.md; test -x update
